name: Baby Vidalia Onion Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Baby Vidalia onions; thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in butter until softened.
2. Combine eggs and sour cream in a bowl.
3. Add the onion mixture to the egg and sour cream mixture.
4. Season with salt, white pepper, and Tabasco.
5. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pastry shell.
6. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese on top.
7. Bake at 450°F for 20 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to 325°F and bake for another 20 minutes or until the cheese melts.
